title: HEST Foamy Camping Mattress Pad
bullets: Memory foam is extremely comfortable - almost feels like my bed
Rolls up for transport, kinda bulky but worth the tradeoff

title: Anker SOLIX C300 Power Station
bullets: Enough capacity to cover me for 3-4 days with all my devices
Compact and easy to carry despite massive capacity
Charge with solar panel or dual USB-C

title: Anker SOLIX C200 Solar Panel
bullets: Compact and captures a good amount of sunlight to charge things up
Peace-of-mind that you'll always have power when paired with a battery

title: LifeStraw Peak Series Personal Water Filter
bullets: Lets you drink out of any lake or stream
You can trust it really filters things out
Small and portable, and can save your life in an emergency
